playinR2._note: Play-in R2 completed. East 8 = ORL, West 8 = PHX.

_meta.source: ESPN/NBA official injury reports, CBS Sports, various sportsbook injury trackers
_meta.note: availability = 30 values: P1, P2, R1G1..G7, R2G1..G7, CFG1..G7, FG1..G7

Luka Doncic.injury: Left hamstring strain (Grade 2) — seeking treatment in Europe, 4-6 week recovery from Apr 2

Austin Reaves.injury: Left oblique strain (Grade 2) — out 4-6 weeks from Apr 4

Joel Embiid.injury: Appendectomy (Apr 9) — out R1, targeting return mid-R2 (~3 weeks post-op)

Devin Booker.injury: Right ankle — load managed end of season, fully available for playoffs

Anthony Edwards.injury: Right knee patellofemoral pain syndrome — played last game, expected available

Stephen Curry.injury: Right knee — returned from 2-month absence, scored 35 vs Clippers, playing tonight

Jimmy Butler III.injury: Right ACL tear (Jan 19) — season-ending, had surgery

Moses Moody.injury: Left patellar tendon tear — season-ending, surgery in March

Fred VanVleet.injury: Right ACL tear (preseason Sep) — out for season, has not played all year

Damian Lillard.injury: Left Achilles tear (2025 playoffs) — season-ending, targeting 2026-27 return

Bradley Beal.injury: Left hip fracture — season-ending, surgery early season, played only 6 games

Cade Cunningham.injury: Collapsed lung — returned Apr 11 vs Bucks (13pts/10ast), conditioning ramp-up

Isaiah Stewart.injury: Left calf strain — returned, expected fully available for playoffs

Isaiah Hartenstein.injury: Left soleus — managed load end of season, expected available for playoffs

Jaylin Williams.injury: Right Achilles tendinitis — could linger into playoffs

Victor Wembanyama.injury: Left rib contusion — ruled out Wed vs Blazers, targeting return for playoffs

Jamal Murray.injury: Right shoulder impingement — expected to play through

Peyton Watson.injury: Right hamstring tightness — week-to-week, could miss early playoff games

Evan Mobley.injury: Calf — managed end of season, expected available for playoffs

Nikola Vucevic.injury: Right ring finger fracture — may need more recovery time

Payton Pritchard.injury: Left foot plantar fasciitis — chronic, expected to play through

Jaylen Brown.injury: Left Achilles tendonitis — rest/management, expected available for playoffs

Kawhi Leonard.injury: Left ankle sprain — load management, expected available for playoffs

Jerami Grant.injury: Right calf strain (Mar 27) — no timetable, uncertain for play-in

Shaedon Sharpe.injury: Left fibula stress reaction — just returned from 28-game absence, minutes restriction

Franz Wagner.injury: Left knee hyperextension (Apr 9) — returned same game, monitoring

Anthony Black.injury: Left lateral abdominal strain — timeline unclear

Paul George.injury: Left knee injury management — expected available

Norman Powell.injury: Right groin soreness — chronic issue, leading scorer, day-to-day

Grayson Allen.injury: Left hamstring strain — questionable for play-in, may miss early R1
